metadata.description: Dermatology diagnostic and prescription core database for China HIS-compatible clinical decision support system

psoriasis.name: Psoriasis
psoriasis.chief_complaint: {location} erythematous plaques with silvery scales for {duration}

differential_diagnosis.differentiator: greasy yellow scales, flexural, less defined

topical_mild.drug_cn: 卡泊三醇倍他米松凝胶

systemic_moderate.special: Folic acid 5mg weekly. NEVER daily dosing.

biologics_severe.special: Exclude active TB/HBV. No live vaccines.

atopic_dermatitis.name: Atopic Dermatitis
atopic_dermatitis.chief_complaint: {age_group} with {location} itchy erythematous patches, recurrent for {duration}

acute.dose: Mid-potency steroid + emollient, damp gauze + dry layer

herpes_simplex.name: Herpes Simplex
herpes_simplex.chief_complaint: {location} clustered vesicles with burning/pain, recurrent for {duration}

acne_vulgaris.name: Acne Vulgaris

differential_diagnosis.differentiator: older, centrofacial erythema, telangiectasia, no comedones
perioral only, no comedones, topical steroid history

moderate.drug_cn: 阿达帕林+过氧化苯甲酰

moderate.special: Combine with BP to prevent resistance
Take with food, avoid lying down 30min

severe.monitor: LFT, lipids q4w, pregnancy test monthly
severe.special: MANDATORY: iPLEDGE equivalent program. 2 forms contraception. Dry skin/lips expected.

education: Isotretinoin: monthly pregnancy tests, no waxing/laser during treatment

rosacea.name: Rosacea

differential_diagnosis.differentiator: comedones present, younger patients, different distribution
greasy scales, scalp involvement, less erythema
malar rash spares nasolabial folds, ANA+, systemic symptoms

PhR.special: CO2 laser, electrosurgery, surgical reshaping for severe rhinophyma

education: Avoid triggers: heat, alcohol, spicy food, sun
Ocular rosacea: lid hygiene, warm compresses

rhinophyma.name: Rhinophyma
rhinophyma.chief_complaint: Progressive nasal enlargement, nodularity, deformity for {duration}
education: Early treatment of rosacea may prevent

benign.special: Complete excision if cosmetic concern or friction site
NEVER laser/cryo/chemical for pigmented lesions - must send for pathology

atypical.special: Refer to dermatology/oncology if severe atypia

melanoma.name: Melanoma
melanoma.ugly_duckling_sign: This lesion looks different from patient's other nevi

differential_diagnosis.differentiator: mild ABCDE changes, biopsy shows mild atypia
history of trauma, grows out with nail

surgical.special: Wide local excision margins: in situ 0.5-1cm, <1mm 1cm, 1-2mm 1-2cm, >2mm 2cm
Sentinel lymph node biopsy if indicated

metastatic.dose: Nivo 1mg/kg + Ipi 3mg/kg q3w x4, then Nivo maintenance

abcde_rule.name: ABCDE Rule

C.name: Color
C.description: Varied: brown, black, tan, red, white, blue

E.name: Evolution
E.description: Changing in size, shape, color, symptoms

abcde_rule.ugly_duckling_sign: One mole that looks different from all others - also warrants evaluation

ugly_duckling_sign.name: Ugly Duckling Sign
ugly_duckling_sign.description: A pigmented lesion that looks different from the patient's other nevi
ugly_duckling_sign.significance: May indicate melanoma even if individual lesion doesn't meet ABCDE criteria
ugly_duckling_sign.action: Biopsy or close monitoring with photography

basal_cell_carcinoma.name: Basal Cell Carcinoma

differential_diagnosis.differentiator: erythematous scaly plaque, SCC in situ
history of trauma/surgery, flat, no pearly border

surgical.special: Standard excision: 4-5mm margins (low-risk), Mohs surgery (high-risk: face, recurrent, morpheaform, >2cm)

education: Risk of local destruction if neglected

squamous_cell_carcinoma.name: Squamous Cell Carcinoma
squamous_cell_carcinoma.chief_complaint: {location} rapidly growing red nodule/ulcer/scaly plaque for {duration}

differential_diagnosis.differentiator: rapid growth, volcano shape, may regress

surgical.special: Standard excision: 4-6mm margins (low-risk), Mohs (high-risk: face, recurrent, >2cm, poorly differentiated, perineural)
Sentinel lymph node biopsy if high-risk

radiation.special: Primary treatment or adjuvant for non-surgical candidates/high-risk

follow_up.every_3-6_months_x2y: Then every 6-12 months, watch for recurrence and new primaries

actinic_keratosis.name: Actinic Keratosis
actinic_keratosis.chief_complaint: {location} rough scaly patches on sun-damaged skin for {duration}
education: SCC transformation risk ~0.1-10% per lesion per year

keratoacanthoma.name: Keratoacanthoma
keratoacanthoma.chief_complaint: Rapidly growing dome-shaped nodule with central keratin plug for {duration}

differential_diagnosis.differentiator: pearly, slower growth, no keratin plug

education: May spontaneously regress but excision preferred
Histologically difficult to distinguish from SCC

pemphigus_vulgaris.name: Pemphigus Vulgaris
pemphigus_vulgaris.chief_complaint: Painful oral erosions and flaccid skin blisters for {duration}

differential_diagnosis.differentiator: tense bullae, negative Nikolsky, elderly, less mucosal
severe mucosal, associated malignancy, polymorphous rash

bullous_pemphigoid.name: Bullous Pemphigoid
bullous_pemphigoid.chief_complaint: Elderly patient with tense itchy blisters for {duration}
bullous_pemphigoid.nikolsky_sign: NEGATIVE - lateral pressure does NOT extend blister

differential_diagnosis.differentiator: flaccid bullae, positive Nikolsky, mucosal, younger

first_line.special: As effective as oral steroids, fewer side effects

education: May be associated with neurological disease (dementia, Parkinson)

nikolsky_sign.name: Nikolsky Sign
nikolsky_sign.description: Lateral pressure on skin extends blister or causes epidermal detachment
nikolsky_sign.method: Apply gentle lateral pressure with finger to blister edge or normal skin
nikolsky_sign.clinical_importance: Critical for distinguishing pemphigus (positive) from pemphigoid (negative)

morbilliform_eruption.name: Morbilliform Drug Eruption
morbilliform_eruption.chief_complaint: Generalized erythematous maculopapular rash after starting {drug} for {duration}

differential_diagnosis.differentiator: fever, respiratory symptoms, lymphadenopathy, no drug exposure
sandpaper rash, strawberry tongue, strep throat

urticaria_drug.name: Urticaria (Drug-Induced)
urticaria_drug.chief_complaint: Generalized itchy wheals after taking {drug} for {duration}

fixed_drug_eruption.name: Fixed Drug Eruption
fixed_drug_eruption.chief_complaint: Recurrent same-site erythematous/violaceous patch after taking {drug}
education: Cross-reactivity with structurally similar drugs possible

sjs_ten.name: SJS/TEN
sjs_ten.name_cn: Stevens-Johnson综合征/中毒性表皮坏死松解症
sjs_ten.chief_complaint: Fever, painful rash, mucosal erosions, skin detachment after {drug} for {duration}

differential_diagnosis.differentiator: children, staph toxin, negative Nikolsky, no mucosal
chronic, no drug trigger, less systemic

emergency.special: HOSPITALIZATION - Burn ICU or specialized unit

supportive.special: Ophthalmology: hourly eye care, prevent synechiae

education: HLA-B*5801 testing for allopurinol (Chinese high risk)
Avoid all suspect drugs and cross-reactants
